_meta.title: Invoice & Billing Module Specification
_meta.purpose: Complete production-ready specification for invoice and billing management including entities, components, API, permissions, state management, and business logic
instructions: Generate all TypeScript types from entities[].fields using ts_type values
Generate Zod schemas from validation rules in each field
Generate React Hook Form forms from show_in_form fields
Generate TanStack Query hooks using react_query_hook names in api.endpoints
Apply domain_rules at db (migrations), api (middleware/guards), and ui (form validation/disabled states)
Use design_system tokens for all Tailwind classes
All mutations must implement optimistic updates via onMutate/onError/onSettled
Auto-generate invoice_number and payment_number server-side only

entities.name: Invoice
entities.description: Core billing document sent to customers requesting payment

fields.name: discount_amount

computed.formula: See domain_rules for discount_amount computation logic

fields.computed_from: IF discount_type=percentage THEN subtotal * discount_value / 100 ELSE discount_value

computed.formula: See domain_rules for tax_total computation logic
See domain_rules for total computation logic

fields.name: version
fields.notes: Optimistic lock version — incremented on every UPDATE

db_constraints.name: chk_invoices_deleted_order
db_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints.name: chk_invoices_currency_len
db_constraints.expression: char_length(currency) = 3 WHERE currency IS NOT NULL

db_constraints.name: chk_invoice_lines_currency_len
db_constraints.expression: char_length(currency) = 3 WHERE currency IS NOT NULL

computed.formula: See domain_rules for outstanding_balance computation logic

entities.name: FinancialPeriod
entities.description: Accounting periods (months, quarters, fiscal years) used to lock and group financial records.
entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON financial_periods USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

entities.name: RevenueAccount
entities.description: Chart-of-accounts entries for revenue lines used in invoice line items and financial reporting.
entities.rls_policy: CREATE POLICY tenant_isolation ON revenue_accounts USING (org_id = current_setting('app.current_org_id')::uuid)

components.name: DataTable
components.description: Sortable, filterable, paginated table for listing entities
components.behavior: Renders a responsive table with column sorting, row selection, and action menus. Shows LoadingSkeleton while loading and EmptyState when data is empty.
components.tailwind: w-full border border-slate-800 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-slate-900

components.name: SlideOverForm
components.description: Slide-in panel for create/edit forms
components.behavior: Slides in from the right, traps focus, closes on Escape or overlay click. Renders form children inside a scrollable body.
components.tailwind: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 flex flex-col bg-slate-900 border-l border-slate-800 shadow-2xl z-50

components.name: FullPageForm
components.description: Full-page layout for complex multi-section forms like invoice creation
components.behavior: Two-column layout with main form area and summary sidebar. Sticky header with breadcrumbs and action buttons.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.description: Colored badge reflecting entity status
components.behavior: Maps status string to color from constants/statusColors.ts. Renders a pill with a dot indicator and label.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

components.name: CurrencyDisplay
components.description: Formats and displays a monetary value
components.behavior: Uses Intl.NumberFormat to format. Negative values render in red when colorizeNegative is true.

components.name: CurrencyInput
components.description: Numeric input formatted as currency
components.behavior: Formats input with currency symbol prefix. Strips non-numeric characters on change. Integrates with React Hook Form via Controller.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white font-mono focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent

components.name: CustomerSelector
components.description: Searchable combobox for selecting an active customer
components.behavior: Fetches customers with is_active=true. Debounced search by display_name. Shows avatar, name, and email in dropdown. Filters out inactive customers.

components.name: InvoiceSelector
components.description: Searchable combobox for selecting an invoice
components.behavior: Filters invoices by customerId and statusFilter if provided. Shows invoice_number, customer, and balance_due in dropdown.

components.name: TaxRateSelect
components.description: Select dropdown for choosing an active tax rate
components.behavior: Lists active tax rates with name and percentage. Includes a None option.

components.name: TaxRateBadge
components.description: Compact badge showing tax rate name and percentage
components.behavior: Displays tax rate code and percentage. Renders as a subtle badge.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-slate-700 text-slate-300

components.name: AccountSelector
components.description: Searchable selector for GL accounts
components.behavior: Searches accounts by name or code. Groups by account type in dropdown.

components.name: AccountLink
components.description: Clickable link to an account detail page
components.behavior: Renders account code and name as a link navigating to /accounts/:id.

components.name: PeriodSelect
components.description: Select for choosing a financial period
components.behavior: Lists open financial periods. Warns if period is locked.

components.name: PeriodBadge
components.description: Badge showing financial period label
components.behavior: Displays period name and year in a badge.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-slate-700 text-slate-300 text-xs

components.name: InvoiceLinesEditor
components.description: Interactive editor for adding, editing, and reordering invoice line items with real-time totals
components.behavior: Renders a list of line rows. Each row has description, quantity, unit_price, discount_pct, tax_rate_id inputs. Shows computed line_total per row. Footer shows real-time subtotal, discount, tax, and total. Supports drag-to-reorder and row deletion.

components.name: EmptyState
components.description: Placeholder shown when a list or view has no data
components.behavior: Centers icon, title, description, and optional CTA button.
components.tailwind: flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-center

components.name: LoadingSkeleton
components.description: Animated placeholder while data is loading
components.behavior: Renders animated shimmer placeholders matching the expected layout.

components.name: ConfirmationDialog
components.description: Modal requiring user confirmation before destructive actions
components.behavior: Blocks interaction behind overlay. Confirm button colored per variant. Supports loading state.
components.tailwind: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center

components.name: PageHeader
components.description: Standardized page header with title, breadcrumbs, and action buttons
components.behavior: Sticky header at top of page content. Renders breadcrumbs above title. Actions float right.
components.tailwind: sticky top-0 z-10 bg-slate-950 border-b border-slate-800 px-6 py-4

components.name: FilterPanel
components.description: Collapsible panel of filter controls for list views
components.behavior: Shows filter inputs inline or in a popover. Active filter count badge on toggle button.

components.name: TabPanel
components.description: Tab navigation with content panels
components.behavior: Renders tab bar and shows only the active panel content.

components.name: TextInput
components.description: Standard text input field
components.behavior: Controlled input with label, error state, and disabled state.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent

components.name: Textarea
components.description: Multi-line text input
components.behavior: Auto-resizes up to max height. Shows character count if maxLength provided.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 resize-none

components.name: NumberInput
components.description: Numeric input with increment/decrement controls
components.behavior: Validates numeric input. Clamps to min/max on blur.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white font-mono

components.name: Select
components.description: Dropdown select input using Radix UI Select
components.behavior: Radix UI primitive with custom dark-themed styling. Supports keyboard navigation.

components.name: MultiSelect
components.description: Multi-value select with tag display
components.behavior: Selected values shown as removable tags inside the input.

components.name: Toggle
components.description: Boolean toggle switch
components.behavior: Radix UI Switch styled as a pill toggle.
components.tailwind: relative inline-flex h-5 w-9 cursor-pointer rounded-full transition-colors

components.name: DatePicker
components.description: Calendar date picker
components.behavior: Popover calendar using date-fns. Returns ISO date string.

components.name: EmailInput
components.description: Email-type text input with format validation
components.behavior: HTML email input with Zod email validation feedback.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white

components.name: TelInput
components.description: Telephone number input with optional flag/country code prefix
components.behavior: Accepts international formats. Strips formatting for storage.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white

components.name: AddressForm
components.description: Structured form for entering a postal address
components.behavior: Fields: line1, line2, city, state, postal_code, country. Country dropdown with ISO codes.

components.name: AddressDisplay
components.description: Formatted display of a postal address
components.behavior: Renders address fields in standard postal format.

components.name: CurrencySelect
components.description: Select for ISO 4217 currency codes
components.behavior: Shows currency code and name. Common currencies prioritized.

components.name: YesNoBadge
components.description: Green/red badge for boolean values
components.behavior: Renders green badge for true, slate badge for false.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

components.name: AbsoluteDate
components.description: Formats a date or timestamp as an absolute date string
components.behavior: Uses date-fns format. Default format: MMM d, yyyy.

components.name: RelativeDate
components.description: Displays a date relative to now (e.g., 3 days ago)
components.behavior: Uses date-fns formatDistanceToNow. Shows absolute on hover via tooltip.

components.name: MonospaceText
components.description: Monospace formatted text for codes, IDs, and numbers
components.behavior: Renders in monospace font. If copyable, shows copy icon on hover.

components.name: PlainText
components.description: Simple text display without special formatting
components.behavior: Renders value or fallback if null. Falls back to em dash.

components.name: TruncatedText
components.description: Text truncated to a single line with tooltip showing full content
components.behavior: CSS text-overflow ellipsis. Radix Tooltip shows full text on hover.

components.name: TextLink
components.description: Clickable text that navigates to a URL
components.behavior: Renders as anchor or React Router Link. External links open in new tab.

components.name: EmailLink
components.description: Clickable mailto link
components.behavior: Renders as a mailto anchor.

components.name: CustomerLink
components.description: Link to a customer detail page
components.behavior: Navigates to /customers/:id.

components.name: InvoiceLink
components.description: Link to an invoice detail page
components.behavior: Navigates to /invoices/:id.

components.name: NumberDisplay
components.description: Formatted numeric display
components.behavior: Formats with Intl.NumberFormat. Supports compact notation (1K, 1M).

components.name: PercentageDisplay
components.description: Displays a decimal as a percentage
components.behavior: Multiplies by 1 and appends % symbol.

components.name: PercentageInput
components.description: Numeric input for percentage values (0-100)
components.behavior: Appends % suffix. Validates range 0-100.
components.tailwind: w-full bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white font-mono

components.name: PaymentMethodBadge
components.description: Badge with icon representing a payment method
components.behavior: Maps method to icon and color. Shows icon and label.
components.tailwind: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-slate-700 text-slate-200

components.name: StatCard
components.description: Dashboard metric card showing a KPI
components.behavior: Displays metric value with percentage change indicator. Green for positive, red for negative.

components.name: ActivityTimeline
components.description: Chronological list of activity events for an entity
components.behavior: Renders a vertical timeline with event type icons, descriptions, user avatars, and timestamps.
components.tailwind: space-y-4 relative before:absolute before:left-3 before:top-0 before:bottom-0 before:w-px before:bg-slate-800

components.name: ReceiptTotal
components.description: Summary block showing invoice totals including subtotal, discounts, tax, and total
components.behavior: Formatted table of financial totals. Balance due highlighted in blue or green (if zero).
components.tailwind: bg-slate-900 border border-slate-800 rounded-lg p-4 space-y-2

components.name: BalanceIndicator
components.description: Visual progress bar showing amount paid vs total
components.behavior: Progress bar with green fill proportional to amount paid. Percentage and amounts labeled.

components.name: NotificationBell
components.description: Header notification bell with unread count badge
components.behavior: Bell icon with badge. Popover shows recent notifications list. Mark-as-read on click.

components.name: AuthGuard
components.description: Route wrapper that enforces authentication and permission checks
components.behavior: Reads from authStore. Redirects to /login if not authenticated. Shows 403 if lacking permission.

components.name: ReportChart
components.description: Recharts-based chart for financial reporting
components.behavior: Responsive Recharts wrapper with dark theme. Tooltip shows formatted values. Legend clickable to toggle series.

modules.name: RevenueAccounts
modules.description: Chart of accounts for revenue GL codes

endpoints.description: List invoices with filtering, sorting, and pagination
Create a new invoice. Server auto-generates invoice_number.
Get a single invoice by ID

response_schema.data: Invoice & { customer: Customer, lines: InvoiceLine[], payments: Payment[] }

endpoints.description: Update a draft invoice. Paid and void invoices reject updates.
endpoints.optimistic_description: Immediately update invoice in cache; roll back on error

endpoints.description: Soft-delete a draft invoice. Sets deleted_at. Non-draft invoices return 409.
endpoints.optimistic_description: Remove invoice from list cache immediately

endpoints.description: Mark invoice as sent and dispatch email to customer. Sets sent_at, status=sent.
Void an invoice. Sets status=void, voided_at, voided_by. Reverses journal entries.
Duplicate an invoice as a new draft with reset status and dates
Manually mark a fully paid invoice as paid. Sets paid_at, status=paid.
Get all line items for an invoice ordered by line_order
Replace all lines for an invoice atomically. Used for bulk save from InvoiceLinesEditor.
endpoints.optimistic_description: Update lines and totals in cache immediately

endpoints.description: Add a single line item to an invoice
Update a specific invoice line item
endpoints.optimistic_description: Update line in cache and recompute totals

endpoints.description: Remove a line item from an invoice
endpoints.optimistic_description: Remove line from cache and recompute totals

endpoints.description: List customers with filtering and pagination
Create a new customer
Get customer details
Update customer details
Soft-delete a customer. Blocked if outstanding invoices exist.
Get all invoices for a customer
Get all payments for a customer
Get account statement for a customer within a date range
List payments
Record a payment against an invoice. Validates amount <= balance_due.
Get a single payment
Delete a payment and reverse its effect on invoice amount_paid and balance_due
Mark a payment as refunded and reverse invoice state
List tax rates
Create a new tax rate
Get a single tax rate
Update a tax rate
endpoints.optimistic_description: Update tax rate in list cache

endpoints.description: Soft-delete a tax rate. Blocked if in use on existing invoice lines.

stores.name: authStore
stores.description: Authenticated user, organization, token, and permissions

stores.name: uiStore
stores.description: Global UI state for modals, slide-overs, and toasts

stores.name: formStore
stores.description: Draft invoice state with lines for the create/edit form

events.description: Emitted when an invoice is successfully sent. Triggers invoice list refetch.
Emitted when a payment is recorded. Triggers invoice and customer cache invalidation.
Emitted by daily scheduled job when invoice becomes overdue.
Emitted on socket reconnection. Triggers full query invalidation.

flows.name: Create and Send Invoice
flows.description: User creates a new invoice, adds line items, saves as draft, then sends to customer

steps.ui: Navigate to /invoices/new
Select customer using CustomerSelector (filtered is_active=true)
steps.action: Form field update, auto-populate payment_terms from customer

steps.ui: Set issue_date, due_date, currency, payment_terms
steps.action: Form field updates, due_date auto-calculated from payment_terms

steps.ui: Add lines using InvoiceLinesEditor (description, qty, price, discount, tax)
steps.action: Real-time computed updates to subtotal/tax/total via formStore

steps.ui: Set optional discount at invoice level (discount_type, discount_value)
steps.action: Recompute discount_amount, total, balance_due in real-time

steps.ui: Click Save Draft
Review invoice preview
Click Send Invoice, confirm in ConfirmationDialog
Toast: Invoice sent. Status badge updates to sent.

flows.name: Record Payment
flows.description: Record a payment against an outstanding invoice

steps.ui: Open Record Payment slide-over from InvoiceDetail or PaymentList
Select invoice (if not pre-filled), enter amount, date, method
steps.action: Form validation: amount must not exceed balance_due

steps.ui: Submit payment
Invoice balance_due decreases. If balance_due=0, invoice status=paid.
steps.action: Backend atomically updates invoice.amount_paid, recalculates balance_due, sets status if needed

steps.ui: Toast: Payment recorded. Invoice badge updates.

flows.name: Void Invoice
flows.description: Void a sent or unpaid invoice and reverse accounting entries

steps.ui: Click Void Invoice on InvoiceDetail. ConfirmationDialog appears.
User confirms. If payments exist, show warning about reversal.
Submit void
Invoice status=void, all action buttons disabled, read-only mode.

journal_entry_side_effects: Reverse: CR Accounts Receivable, DR Revenue, DR Tax Payable (reversal entries)

flows.name: Apply Discount
flows.description: Apply invoice-level discount and see real-time recalculation

steps.ui: In invoice form, select discount_type (percentage or fixed)
Enter discount_value
steps.action: Triggers computed field recalculation in formStore

steps.ui: ReceiptTotal updates in real-time: discount_amount, total, balance_due
Save invoice to persist discount

computed_fields.formula: IF discount_type = 'percentage' THEN subtotal * discount_value / 100 ELSE IF discount_type = 'fixed' THEN discount_value ELSE 0
SUM(invoices.balance_due WHERE org_id = customer.org_id AND customer_id = customer.id AND status NOT IN ['void', 'paid'])

domain_rules.api_guard: Reject payment if payment.amount > invoice.balance_due with HTTP 422
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable submit and show error if amount entered exceeds balance_due

domain_rules.api_guard: Return HTTP 409 if POST /payments is attempted against a voided invoice
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Hide Record Payment button when invoice.status = 'void'

domain_rules.api_guard: Return HTTP 409 if PATCH /invoices/:id is attempted when status = 'paid'
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Render all invoice fields as display-only when status is 'paid' or 'void'

domain_rules.rule: Invoice total must equal subtotal - discount_amount + tax_total
domain_rules.api_guard: Recompute and overwrite total server-side on every save, reject if client-submitted total disagrees
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Total is always computed and never directly editable
domain_rules.db_constraint: Trigger to enforce total = subtotal - discount_amount + tax_total on INSERT/UPDATE

domain_rules.rule: invoice_number must be unique within org
domain_rules.api_guard: Server generates invoice_number, never accepts from client
domain_rules.ui_behavior: invoice_number field is display-only, never shown in form

domain_rules.rule: Overdue status is auto-set by scheduled job
domain_rules.api_guard: Daily cron job sets status = 'overdue' WHERE due_date < NOW() AND status IN ('sent', 'partial')
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Overdue status displayed with amber/red StatusBadge

domain_rules.rule: Tax rate code must be unique within org
domain_rules.api_guard: Return HTTP 409 with field error if code already exists for org
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show inline error on code field if duplicate detected via API
domain_rules.db_constraint: UNIQUE INDEX ON (org_id, code) ON tax_rates

constraints: InvoiceLinesEditor MUST show real-time subtotal, tax, and total preview that updates on every field change without saving
StatusBadge MUST read all color mappings from constants/statusColors.ts and never inline color strings
EVERY mutation MUST implement onMutate, onError, and onSettled for optimistic updates following TanStack Query v5 patterns
CustomerSelector MUST always filter is_active=true unless explicitly overridden by a prop
Invoice number MUST be auto-generated server-side and NEVER accepted from client request body
Payment amount MUST be validated server-side to not exceed invoice.balance_due
All monetary displays MUST use CurrencyDisplay component with consistent locale formatting
All date displays MUST use date-fns and respect the org timezone setting
Void and paid invoices MUST render all fields as read-only using display components, not input components
AuthGuard MUST wrap all routes and check both authentication and feature-level permissions
All DELETE operations MUST show ConfirmationDialog before executing
TanStack Query query keys MUST be imported from constants/queryKeys.ts, never hardcoded inline

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
